prompt:
Optimize the following page title and meta description for the keyword 'ai agent automation':

Title: 'Welcome to Our Platform'
Meta Description: 'We build software for businesses.'

Provide improved versions with character counts.

mock_result.response:
SEO Optimization for 'ai agent automation':

Optimized Title (58 chars):
'AI Agent Automation Platform for Developers | Genesis'
[Includes primary keyword, brand name, target audience]

Optimized Meta Description (155 chars):
'Build and deploy autonomous AI agents in minutes. Genesis automates complex workflows with intelligent multi-agent orchestration. Start free.'
[Includes keyword, value prop, CTA, within 160-char limit]

Changes made:
- Added primary keyword 'AI agent automation' near title start
- Replaced generic descriptor with specific value proposition
- Added CTA 'Start free' to improve CTR
- Meta description meets Google's 150-160 char sweet spot
